name: Zucchini-Layered Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meat loaf mixture, except spread 1/3 of it evenly in an ungreased loaf pan (9 x 5 x 3 inches).
2. Sprinkle half of each cheese, zucchini, and pimento over the meat layer.
3. Spread the layers to within 1/2 inch of all sides of the pan. Repeat steps until finished with a layer of meat mixture on top.
4. Cover the layers completely by spreading the remaining meat mixture to the sides of the pan.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
6. Drain off excess fat and let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing into thick slices.
7. Serve on a heated platter.
